query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_order.quotes (
                id, tenant_id, client_id, title, software_tenant_id,
                status, currency, subtotal, tax, total,
                order_date, expiration_date, url,
                delivery_date, billing_info_id, invoice_address_id,
                created_at, updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                client_id = VALUES(client_id),
                title = VALUES(title),
                software_tenant_id = VALUES(software_tenant_id),
                status = VALUES(status),
                currency = VALUES(currency),
                subtotal = VALUES(subtotal),
                tax = VALUES(tax),
                total = VALUES(total),
                order_date = VALUES(order_date),
                expiration_date = VALUES(expiration_date),
                url = VALUES(url),
                delivery_date = VALUES(delivery_date),
                billing_info_id = VALUES(billing_info_id),
                invoice_address_id = VALUES(invoice_address_id),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
